metadata.title: Why pick a Freelance Web Designer & Developer · Stop paying 6 people for a one-person job | Federico Calicchia
metadata.description: Freelance Web Designer & Developer: one contact for websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, maintenance and WordPress. No hand-offs, no agency middlemen. Manifesto, 5-pillar approach, FAQ.
metadata.ogTitle: Why pick a Freelance Web Designer & Developer · Stop paying 6 people for a one-person job
metadata.ogDescription: One contact, no blame shifting, measured results. Manifesto, approach, FAQ.

hero.title: Stop paying 6 people for a one-person job.
hero.lead:
One contact for websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, maintenance and WordPress.
No hand-offs, no agency middlemen.

manifesto.title: Manifesto
manifesto.subtitle: Seven non-negotiable principles
manifesto.h2: What a website has to do.

siteAsSalesperson.label: The website is a salesperson
siteAsSalesperson.text:
It works when you are not there.
It has to explain, reassure and bring the right person to contact.

googlePositioning.label: It ranks on Google
googlePositioning.text:
If people cannot find you, you do not exist.
Technical SEO, semantic structure, schema markup and performance: included, not sold as an extra.

customerLanguage.label: It speaks your customers' language
customerLanguage.text:
No jargon, no useless acronyms, no "innovative solutions".
The website is written for the person buying, not the person building it.

visitToContact.label: It turns a visit into contact
visitToContact.text:
Every page has an outcome: an enquiry, a booking, a purchase.
Pages without an objective are flyers in a drawer.

trustFollowsForm.label: Form follows trust
trustFollowsForm.text:
A slow, confusing or over-decorated website does not just lose aesthetic quality.
It loses attention and credibility.

noRecycledTemplates.label: No recycled templates
noRecycledTemplates.text:
Every page needs a reason to exist.
Content, hierarchy and interactions have to be built around your real case.

oneContact.label: One contact
oneContact.text: Fewer repeated briefings, fewer opaque hand-offs, more responsibility for decisions, timing and the final result.

team.title: I don't work alone.
team.lead:
When the project demands it, I bring in professionals I trust who share the same standard.
You always and only talk to me — but there is a team ready behind the scenes.

perChiLavoro.subtitleDefault:
Pick the sector, then the activity, and I show you the services I do for you.
No buck-passing, no wasted time.
perChiLavoro.servicesCount: {count, plural, one {# service available} other {# services available}}
perChiLavoro.activitiesFound: {count, plural, one {# activity found} other {# activities found}}
perChiLavoro.activitiesInCategory: {count, plural, one {# activity in this sector} other {# activities in this sector}}
perChiLavoro.noActivitiesFound: No activity found. Try a broader term.
perChiLavoro.noServicesYet: I do not have a public page for this combination yet. Write me and I handle it as a custom case.

perchiFaqs.subtitleDefault: Answers to the questions everyone asks me — even before we start.

heroNarrative.h1:
One person,
accountable for the whole site.
heroNarrative.lead:
You are not looking for "someone who builds a site".
You need someone who understands the business, designs the experience, writes the code, and ships a system you can actually use.
Mess scatter, more accountability.
heroNarrative.portraitAlt: Federico Calicchia, Freelance Web Designer & Developer

skillsOverride.title: My tools.
skillsOverride.subtitle:
Modern tech, AI, and the right tools for each phase of the project.
This is what I work with every day.

laScintilla.lead:
The point is not "doing everything".
It is keeping the decisions in one place: strategy, experience, code and launch speak the same language because they do not get passed from one department to the next.

direzione.label: Direction
direzione.description: Goals, priorities, content and user paths get sorted before any visual work begins.

progetto.label: Design
progetto.description: Layout, visual tone and components are built to support conversion, trust and readability.

produzione.label: Production
produzione.description: Development, performance, technical SEO and launch stay inside the same workflow.
